rules.rule: No compat shims, [Obsolete] aliases, backwards-compat wrappers, or migration helpers. Aggressive API breaking with every call site updated in the same change.

Domain logic rides typed result/effect rails — C# monadic results, TypeScript Effect with tagged faults, Python typed results. Raw exceptions or dual error paradigms crossing domain boundaries are defects.
One function owns all modalities of a concern, discriminating on input shape. get/getMany/getById proliferation, function spam, and singleton helper files where an owning surface exists are defects.
NuGet versions live only in Directory.Packages.props, hand-edited. TypeScript dependencies are registry packages via pnpm with the committed lockfile; vendored SDKs are defects.
